scripts._comment: Scripts use --prefix to run inside the framework packages (pre-publication).
scripts._comment_published: Once @fromcode119/* packages are on npm, replace --prefix paths with the installed bins.
scripts.dev:api-admin: concurrently -n proxy,api,admin -c white,cyan,green "PROXY_PORT=3000 API_PORT=4000 ADMIN_PORT=3001 node proxy.js" "FROMCODE_PROJECT_ROOT=../../starters/local PORT=4000 npm run dev --prefix ../../packages/api" "NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://localhost:3000 NEXT_PUBLIC_ADMIN_BASE_PATH=/admin PORT=3001 npm run dev --prefix ../../packages/admin"
scripts.dev: concurrently -n proxy,api,admin,web -c white,cyan,green,yellow "PROXY_PORT=3000 API_PORT=4000 ADMIN_PORT=3001 FRONTEND_PORT=3002 node proxy.js" "FROMCODE_PROJECT_ROOT=../../starters/local PORT=4000 npm run dev --prefix ../../packages/api" "NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://localhost:3000 NEXT_PUBLIC_ADMIN_BASE_PATH=/admin PORT=3001 npm run dev --prefix ../../packages/admin" "NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://localhost:3000 PORT=3002 npm run dev --prefix ../../packages/frontend"
scripts.start:api-admin: concurrently -n proxy,api,admin -c white,cyan,green "PROXY_PORT=3000 API_PORT=4000 ADMIN_PORT=3001 node proxy.js" "FROMCODE_PROJECT_ROOT=../../starters/local PORT=4000 npm run start --prefix ../../packages/api" "NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://localhost:3000 NEXT_PUBLIC_ADMIN_BASE_PATH=/admin PORT=3001 npm run start --prefix ../../packages/admin"
scripts.start: concurrently -n proxy,api,admin,web -c white,cyan,green,yellow "PROXY_PORT=3000 API_PORT=4000 ADMIN_PORT=3001 FRONTEND_PORT=3002 node proxy.js" "FROMCODE_PROJECT_ROOT=../../starters/local PORT=4000 npm run start --prefix ../../packages/api" "NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://localhost:3000 NEXT_PUBLIC_ADMIN_BASE_PATH=/admin PORT=3001 npm run start --prefix ../../packages/admin" "NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://localhost:3000 PORT=3002 npm run start --prefix ../../packages/frontend"
